summary: Full audit testing of The Doggy Company (Mira) pet operating system. All major features verified working on mobile (375x812): Login/Logout, Dashboard, Pet Home with Soul Ring (87%), Mira AI Chat with soul context, and all 14+ pillar pages load correctly with proper content and navigation.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - use /api/auth/me instead for user profile
Returns 404 - endpoint may not be implemented

action_items: OPTIONAL: Previous iteration identified soul score discrepancy (87% vs 53%) on KNOW_MORE_START screen in SoulBuilder.jsx - verify if fixed

Pet selector on mobile shows names with proper truncation (truncate max-w-[80px])
All 14 pillar pages load with proper content and navigation on mobile
Soul score displays correctly (87% for Mystique) on Pet Home and dashboard
Mira AI chat shows pet context (soul score, traits, preferences)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pillar pages, dashboard, pet home, mira demo working)
